zh.lifeSummary: 當King Hugh Roe O'Donnell於1427年出生在愛爾蘭度布林時，他的父親Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell14歲，母親Nuala O'Conner22歲。他於1464年與Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond在愛爾蘭庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年7月11日在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾 卡素享年78歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Hugh Roe O'Donnell于1427年出生在爱尔兰度布林时，他的父亲Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell14岁，母亲Nuala O'Conner22岁。他于1464年与Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond在爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年7月11日在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾 卡素享年78岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾。

nameMeanings.name: O'Donnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Niall, Siobhan, Brennan, Bridie, Declan, Donal, Fergus, Jarlath, John Patrick, Padraic.

Irish (Donegal, Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Domhnaill ‘descendant of Domhnall’, an old personal name composed of the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare the Anglicized form Donald and the Scottish clan name McDonald .

History: The O'Donnells, like the O'Neills (see   O'Neill  ), claim descent from Niall of the Nine Hostages (Niall Noígíallach), a legendary 5th-century king of Ireland. Their traditional base is Tyrconnell (i.e. Donegal).

variants.name: O'Daniel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Donnell  , influenced by the Biblical name   Daniel  , to which it is etymologically unrelated.

variants.name: O'Donald
meanings: Irish: Scotticized form of O'Donnell . The Irish personal name Domhnall was Latinized as Donaldus, which is the source of Donald, the form of the personal name used in English in Scotland, though not in Ireland. The form O'Donald is therefore a 19th-century hybrid. Compare Donald .

variants.name: Donald
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McDonald (Mac Dhomhnaill), from the Gaelic personal name Domhnall; found in 13th- and 14th-century Scotland as Dofnald, Douenald, Dufenald, and Donald.
Irish (Ulster): possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   O'Donell  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Roe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When King Hugh Roe O'Donnell was born in 1427, in Dublin, Ireland, his father, Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell, was 14 and his mother, Nuala O'Conner, was 22. He married Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond in 1464, in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 July 1505, in Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Ireland, at the age of 78, and was buried in Donegal, County Donegal, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Hugh Roe O'Donnell est né en 1427, à Dublin, Irlande, son père, Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Nuala O'Conner, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond en 1464, à Tirconnell, County Fermànagh, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1505, à Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Irlande, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Donegal, County Donegal, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Hugh Roe O'Donnell 1427 in Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell 14 und seine Mutter Nuala O'Conner 22. Er hat 1464 in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irland Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1505 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Irland und wurde in Donegal, County Donegal, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Hugh Roe O'Donnell è nato il nel 1427 nel Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Nuala O'Conner, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond nel 1464, nel Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1505, nel Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Irlanda, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Donegal, County Donegal, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Hugh Roe O'Donnellが1427年にアイルランドダブリンで生まれた時，父Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnellは14歳，母Nuala O'Connerは22歳であった。1464年にアイルランドコウントイ フエルマナグティルコネルでFionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年7月11日にアイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルドンエガル カストルで78歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルドンエガルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Hugh Roe O'Donnell(이)가 1427년 아일랜드 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Nuala O'Conner(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1464년 아일랜드 카운티 퍼먼아그h 티르콘에서 Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 7월 11일 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 도네걸 카스틀에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 도네걸에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Hugh Roe O'Donnell nasceu em 1427, em Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Nuala O'Conner, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond em 1464, em Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1505, em Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Irlanda, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Donegal, County Donegal, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Hugh Roe O'Donnell родился в 1427 г. в местности дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Nuala O'Conner, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond в 1464 г. в местности тирконнелл, коунти фирманаг, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1505 г. в местности доунегаль кастл, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности доунегаль, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия.

sm.from 1461 to 1505: mai le 1461 e o'o I le 1505

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Hugh Roe O'Donnell nació en 1427, en Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, Naughton O'Donnell, King of Tyrconnell, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Nuala O'Conner, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond en 1464, en Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1505, en Donegal Castle, County Donegal, Irlanda, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Donegal, County Donegal, Irlanda.
